entries.prompt_text: add a {references} section after the {conclusion}

add a clickable hyperlink to the url printed as plain text in {reference 1}

change the {Findings} heading from {Heading 3} to {Heading 2} to match sibling sections

rename the {Misc} section heading to {Additional Considerations}
